name: Kobold
description: A small, cowardly reptilian humanoid with rust-colored scales. Armed with crude weapons and prone to fleeing.

attacks.name: Rusty Dagger
attacks.description: A quick stab with a poorly maintained blade

attacks.name: Sling
attacks.description: A stone hurled from a crude sling

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.description: Gains +1 to attack rolls when adjacent to an ally

behavior.notes: Will flee when HP drops to 3 or below
